name: China Smartpay Group Holdings Limited
summary: China Smartpay Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the prepaid cards and internet payment businesses in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, Thailand, and Singapore. The company also offers trade financing, and securities investment services, as well as issues prestige benefits cards to consumers and financial institutions. In addition, it engages in the internet micro-credit business; software development activities; provision of travel package; hotel booking agency; and merchant acquiring businesses. The company was formerly known as Oriental City Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Smartpay Group Holdings Limited in March 2014. China Smartpay Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Sai Wan, Hong Kong.
